name: Ahmad Vahidi
summary: Day 63 Thursday — DAY 7 OF 7-DAY VAHIDI-TARGETING TRIGGER WINDOW (CLOSES TODAY 2026-05-03; final day of CNN-strike-leak watching); CENTCOM 'SHORT AND POWERFUL' STRIKE PLAN PREPARED-NOT-ACTIVATED ELEVATES THE READINESS TIER. Per Axios Apr 29: U.S. Central Command has prepared a plan for a 'short and powerful' wave of strikes on Iran in hopes of breaking the negotiating deadlock, likely including infrastructure targets. Trump as of Tuesday night had NOT ordered any kinetic action, preferring blockade-as-economic-warfare. This is OPERATIONAL-READINESS intelligence, not activation. The strike-list-activation watching trigger from yesterday remains at Day 6 of 14 (closes 2026-05-10). The rhetoric+preparation pattern from yesterday holds, with one update: CENTCOM's plan being 'prepared and held' is closer to active than yesterday's framing — but the operational test (no Pentagon ROE escalation, no targeting kinetic) holds NOT-ACTIVATED. Reuters Apr 28 wire-tier 'central interlocutor has been IRGC commander Ahmad Vahidi' framework intact; ISW Day 8 'Vahidi inner circle dominates' intact. Per Axios Apr 27: Iran's FM Araghchi told all 4 mediator channels 'no consensus inside Iranian leadership' = OPERATIONAL PARALYSIS UNDER VAHIDI-IRGC. Iran rial 1.8M (90% to 2M trigger) is the empirical economic-pressure validation. Trump-Axios 'choking like a stuffed pig' rejection of Hormuz-First. 8-day kinetic pause continues. Mashhad 'Martyrs' mural Day 5 of 7-day refutation window. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]
